title: SPHINCS+ Hypertree Structure
description: Understanding the multi-layer hypertree architecture that enables stateless hash-based signatures in SLH-DSA/SPHINCS+.
learningObjectives: Understand the hypertree structure of SPHINCS+
Learn how XMSS trees are combined into a hypertree
Master the FORS (Forest of Random Subsets) few-time signature
Understand how randomization achieves stateless operation
Learn the complete signature generation flow
